name_en: 💢💢The hot 22 bag shopping tote AS3261 for Spring/Summer 2022. This season's most popular and must-have series, named 22 bag. Chanel's numbered names are always popular ♨️ and destined to become classics [Happy]. Super stylish and elegant, very easy to match. That's it 💯. Carry it and you're a top trendsetter! Size: 39×42×8cm
